HALF-OPEN → probe one request
success → CLOSED · fail → OPEN

span.p:
1. DEFINE STEADY STATE
observable metrics before you start

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3. MINIMUM VIABLE EXPERIMENT
inject toxic; blast radius: localhost only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4. OBSERVE
does metric deviate from steady state?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5. HARDEN
code fix, runbook entry, new test
(backlog — not a Slack thread)

span.p:
Toxiproxy (localhost:5433 → :5555)
toxics: timeout · latency · bandwidth · slow_close · reset_peer

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Downstream dependency (DB, OAuth, cache)
unaware of proxy
